## What changed

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Safety impact

Explain whether this changes file operations, paths, persistence, recovery, or Recycle Bin behavior. Write `None` when it does not.

## Validation

- [ ] Release build succeeds without warnings
- [ ] Relevant automated tests pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes
- [ ] No private paths, media, credentials, databases, logs, or generated artifacts are included
